results.title: NEET-UG 2026: Metal Detectors Used, Zipper Chains, Buttons, Hair Accessories Removed Before Entry In Indore -- VIDEO
results.description: Strict security arrangements for the NEET-UG 2026 exam in Madhya Pradesh caused stress for students. Strict rules included banning personal pens, removing hair accessories, and cutting sacred threads, allowing only admit cards and identity documents. Despite minor issues like locked earrings and a missing document, helpful police interventions ensured candidates successfully entered.

results.title: How To Make Quick Palak Corn Soup At Home For A Healthy And Flavourful Meal
results.description: Quick Palak Corn Soup is a wholesome and flavourful dish that combines the goodness of spinach and sweet corn in a light, comforting bowl. Easy to prepare and packed with nutrients, this soup makes an excellent choice for a light meal, appetiser or evening snack. Its creamy texture, vibrant colour and balanced flavours make it a family favourite throughout the year.

results.title: Ram Mohan Naidu comments
results.description: గుంటూరు జిల్లాలో రాజకీయం చేయాలంటే పీహెచ్‌డీ కావాలని కేంద్ర మంత్రి రామ్మోహన్ నాయుడు అన్నారు. రాజకీయం పుట్టింది గుంటూరులో అంటారని, మరొక 30 ఏళ్ల పాటు కూటమి ప్రభుత్వం అధికారంలో ఉండేలా ఆశీర్వదించాలని ప్రజలను కోరారు.

results.title: India Celebrates Yoga Day at Shanghai’s Iconic BFC
results.description: The Consulate General of India in Shanghai marked the 12th International Day of Yoga at the Bund Finance Centre, bringing together yoga enthusiasts and members of the Indian and Chinese communities to promote wellness, harmony and the enduring message of yoga.
